name: base-node-monitor
description: Network monitoring tool for Base Mainnet and Sepolia that tracks node client versions and distribution

scripts.crawl: node -e "require('./src/database/db'); require('./src/crawler/crawler'); const db = new (require('./src/database/db'))(); const crawler = new (require('./src/crawler/crawler'))(db); crawler.crawlAllNetworks().then(r => { console.log(JSON.stringify(r, null, 2)); process.exit(0); })"
